content_preview: Structured guide for AI-to-AI collaboration covering 4 core patterns (snowballing/accumulative iteration, cascading/multi-step relay, expansive inquiry/parallel exploration, critique & challenge/peer review), prompting syntax conventions (role definition, turn-taking markers, handoff signals, termination tokens), 5 critique/expansion models (self-reflective, dual-agent debate, red/blue team, specialist swarm, memory-augmented), reliability engineering (shared state, handoff confirmation, cascading failure prevention, continuity strategies), and human oversight integration (checkpoints, supervisor agents, emergency stops, curation). Cites LangGraph, AutoGen, CAMEL, MetaGPT, CollabStory, Reflexion frameworks.
